def: The hook on the end of an eccentric rod opposite the strap.See. Illust. of Eccentric.
The quality of being sentimental; the character or behavior ofa sentimentalist; sentimentality.
A great Brazilian palm tree (Raphia tædigera), used by thenatives for many purposes.
One who corrupts, or who upholds corruption. Sydney Smith.
To surpass in preaching.And for a villain's quick conversion A pillory can outpreach aparson. Trumbull.
A glucoside extracted from the bark of the oak (Quercus) as abitter citron-yellow crystalline substance, used as a pigment andcalled quercitron.
A loose and flowing outer garment, worn by the ancient Greeks;a kind of cloak.
Hellenism as surviving or revival in modern times; the practiceor pursuit of ancient Greek ideals in modern life, art, orliterature, as in the Renaissance.
